title: The Studio
intro: Giannis & Elina Kyriakou Architecture Studio. Founded in 1975 in Patras. Our practice focuses on the design, supervision and construction of buildings. Our permanent collaboration with civil, electrical, mechanical and surveying engineers ensures the quality and completeness of every project.
philosophyText: Architect Engineer, Aristotle University of Thessaloniki (1972). Supervising engineer on military works of the "Metaxas Line" (1972–1974). K. Zervas architectural office, Athens (1974–1975). Founded his own practice in 1975. Vice president of SANA (1988–1990), member of NSDE (1991–1993), EPAE member representing TEE and SANA. Jury member in national architectural competitions representing SADAS.
experienceText: Architect Engineer, National Technical University of Athens (2000). Board member of the Architects Association of Achaia. Lecturer in Freehand and Technical Drawing at TEI Patras. Participation in architectural competitions with published studies. Member of organising committees for the 4th and 5th Panhellenic Exhibition of Architectural Work (Patras 2004, 2006).
